{{Quote|One razor bug is a nuisance. Three might leave you scarred. Five will flay you alive.|[[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]]|<ref name="New Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology">''[[The New Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]''</ref>}}
'''Razor bugs''' or '''razorbugs''' were small, disc-shaped [[Insect/Legends|insects]] that were biologically engineered by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] to serve as thrown ranged weapons that had the capability of being thrown up to 130 meters.<ref name="Legacy Era Campaign Guide" />

==Description==
[[File:Razorbug2-NEGWT.png|thumb|left|250px|A spiked variant of razor bug]]
Razor bugs were projectile [[biot]]s used by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. Shaped from the [[sparkbee]], the razor bug was a relative of the [[Nang hul|thud bug]], but served a different purpose. Essentially living [[Knife/Legends|knives]], razor bugs had carapaces that were capable of shredding flesh and piercing certain types of [[Armor/Legends|armor]]. When thrown, the razor bug would deploy its wings which helped guide it towards the target, giving it the homing capabilities similar to the thud bug. They also had a vapid tenaciousness to continue attacking a target until either it or the razor bug was subdued.

Yuuzhan Vong warriors could throw several razor bugs at once to engulf their enemies.<ref name="New Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology" /> A skilled wielder could also throw the razor bug and cause it to immediately return to his hand.<ref name="Legacy Era Campaign Guide" /> Like other Yuuzhan Vong weapons, razor bugs could be integrated into a Yuuzhan Vong's chest and body.<ref name="New Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology" />

[[File:RazorBugUnderside-FF70.png|thumb|right|250px|An underside view of a razor bug]]
Yuuzhan Vong warriors armed with razor bugs included [[Choka Skell]] and [[Liaan Lah]].<ref name="Legacy Era Campaign Guide" />

Following the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] they became outlawed, but were still used by such underworld types as [[Jariah Syn]].
